input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that deliberately exercise OGNL internals or reflective access to JDK classes on JDK 9+ may need the existing test JVM opening such as --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED, but this is not required for ordinary public-bean expression coverage.
The reported Java-run failure for 3.3.5 appears to be a version behavior/test expectation issue rather than missing setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL 3.3.5 is a pure in-process Java expression library; its only runtime dependency, org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA, is declared transitively by the artifact. Normal OGNL usage through Ognl.parseExpression/getValue/setValue reaches meaningful coverage without Docker, extra Maven dependencies, environment variables, or required system properties.
